panels.title: Warehouse Floor Map (walls + robot + obstacles)
panels.description: 2D warehouse map showing wall segments (gray), inner contour rectangles (orange), robot position trail (blue), matched obstacles (green), and unmatched obstacles (red).

targets.rawSql: WITH latest AS (SELECT compound FROM attributes WHERE id LIKE '%warehouse_geometry' ORDER BY ts DESC LIMIT 1) SELECT (seg->>'x1')::double precision as x1, (seg->>'y1')::double precision as y1, (seg->>'x2')::double precision as x2, (seg->>'y2')::double precision as y2 FROM latest, jsonb_array_elements(compound->'wall_segments') as seg

WITH latest AS (SELECT compound FROM attributes WHERE id LIKE '%warehouse_geometry' ORDER BY ts DESC LIMIT 1) SELECT poly_idx, (pt->>'x')::double precision as x, (pt->>'y')::double precision as y FROM latest, jsonb_array_elements(compound->'inner_polygons') WITH ORDINALITY AS polys(poly, poly_idx), jsonb_array_elements(poly) AS pt

SELECT x, y FROM (SELECT ts, (compound->>'x')::double precision as x, (compound->>'y')::double precision as y FROM attributes WHERE id LIKE '%robot_position' ORDER BY ts DESC LIMIT 5) sub ORDER BY sub.ts

WITH latest AS (SELECT compound FROM attributes WHERE id LIKE '%predicted_heatmap' ORDER BY ts DESC LIMIT 1) SELECT (cell->>'x')::double precision as x, (cell->>'y')::double precision as y, (cell->>'v')::int as value FROM latest, jsonb_array_elements(compound->'hot_cells') as cell

WITH chunks AS (SELECT DISTINCT ON (id) compound FROM attributes WHERE id ~ 'map_obstacles_[0-9]' ORDER BY id, ts DESC) SELECT (r->>0)::double precision AS x_min, (r->>1)::double precision AS y_min, (r->>2)::double precision AS x_max, (r->>3)::double precision AS y_max FROM chunks, jsonb_array_elements(compound->'rectangles') AS r

WITH latest AS (SELECT compound FROM attributes WHERE id LIKE '%obstacle_report' ORDER BY ts DESC LIMIT 1) SELECT (seg->>'x1')::double precision as x1, (seg->>'y1')::double precision as y1, (seg->>'x2')::double precision as x2, (seg->>'y2')::double precision as y2 FROM latest, jsonb_array_elements(compound->'matched_segments') as seg

WITH latest AS (SELECT compound FROM attributes WHERE id LIKE '%obstacle_report' ORDER BY ts DESC LIMIT 1) SELECT (seg->>'x1')::double precision as x1, (seg->>'y1')::double precision as y1, (seg->>'x2')::double precision as x2, (seg->>'y2')::double precision as y2 FROM latest, jsonb_array_elements(compound->'unmatched_segments') as seg

panels.title: Map Sync
panels.description: Flush buffered warehouse map data to Grafana and start live streaming

targets.rawSql: SELECT 0::int AS alert
SELECT 1::int AS ready
SELECT 2.3::float AS value
SELECT 99.9978::float AS value
SELECT ts AS time, entityid, CASE WHEN boolean THEN 1 ELSE 0 END as alert FROM attributes WHERE id LIKE '%obstacle_alert' AND ts > now() - interval '1 hour' ORDER BY ts

SELECT time_bucket('5 minutes', ts) AS time, entityid, COUNT(*) as alerts FROM attributes WHERE id LIKE '%obstacle_alert' AND boolean = true AND ts > now() - interval '24 hours' GROUP BY time, entityid ORDER BY time

panels.title: Average Alert Duration
panels.description: How long each obstacle alert lasted before clearing

targets.rawSql: SELECT 4.2::float AS value

panels.title: Mean Time between Alerts (MTBA)
panels.description: Average time between alert starts. Short intervals suggest persistent safety issues.

targets.rawSql: SELECT 11.2::float AS value
SELECT 2375::int AS value

panels.title: Alert Trend (slope)
panels.description: Linear regression slope of alerts/hour over 24h. Positive = increasing alerts, negative = improving. Near zero = stable.

targets.rawSql: WITH hourly AS (SELECT time_bucket('1 hour', ts) AS hour, COUNT(*) as cnt FROM attributes WHERE id LIKE '%obstacle_alert' AND boolean = true AND ts > now() - interval '24 hours' GROUP BY hour), numbered AS (SELECT hour, cnt, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY hour) as n FROM hourly), stats AS (SELECT COUNT(*) as N, SUM(n) as sx, SUM(cnt) as sy, SUM(n * cnt) as sxy, SUM(n * n) as sxx FROM numbered) SELECT CASE WHEN N * sxx - sx * sx > 0 THEN (N * sxy - sx * sy)::float / (N * sxx - sx * sx)::float ELSE 0 END as slope FROM stats

panels.title: Time Between Alerts (rolling)
panels.description: Gap between consecutive alert starts over time. Decreasing trend = deteriorating safety conditions.

targets.rawSql: WITH alert_starts AS (SELECT ts, LAG(ts) OVER (ORDER BY ts) as prev_ts FROM attributes WHERE id LIKE '%obstacle_alert' AND boolean = true AND ts > now() - interval '24 hours') SELECT ts AS time, EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (ts - prev_ts)) as gap_seconds FROM alert_starts WHERE prev_ts IS NOT NULL ORDER BY ts

panels.title: Node Health Level Over Time
panels.description: Diagnostic level per node: 0=OK, 1=WARN, 2=ERROR. Spikes indicate node issues.

targets.rawSql: SELECT ts AS time, key as node_name, (value->>'level')::int as level FROM attributes, jsonb_each(compound) WHERE id LIKE '%diagnostics' AND ts > now() - interval '1 hour' AND value ? 'level' ORDER BY ts

panels.title: Scan Age (from diagnostics)
panels.description: How old the last scan is, as reported by node diagnostics. Rising = node is falling behind.

targets.rawSql: SELECT ts AS time, key as node_name, (value->>'last_scan_age_sec')::float as scan_age FROM attributes, jsonb_each(compound) WHERE id LIKE '%diagnostics' AND ts > now() - interval '1 hour' AND value ? 'last_scan_age_sec' ORDER BY ts

panels.title: Robot Position Trail
panels.description: AGV position history on the warehouse floor (XY scatter). Recent positions in blue.

targets.rawSql: SELECT (compound->>'x')::float as x, (compound->>'y')::float as y FROM attributes WHERE id LIKE '%robot_position' AND ts > now() - interval '10 minutes' ORDER BY ts
SELECT ts AS time, (compound->>'x')::float as x FROM attributes WHERE id LIKE '%robot_position' AND ts > now() - interval '10 minutes' ORDER BY ts
SELECT ts AS time, (compound->>'y')::float as y FROM attributes WHERE id LIKE '%robot_position' AND ts > now() - interval '10 minutes' ORDER BY ts

panels.title: Detected Ratio (detected/spawned)
panels.description: Fraction of spawned obstacles detected. Target: 1.0

targets.rawSql: SELECT 1.0::float AS value
